productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Graphic Green Tshirt
description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has cap sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Use warm iron; do not iron on print and embroidery New year's round the corner and parties are all set to rule the roost. Slip into absolute comfort with this green printed T-shirt from flying machine and hit the dance floor in style. Created using soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort, this T-shirt looks great with denim trousers or skirts, and even shorts and kitten-heel sandals. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33
